## What changed

Describe the implementation and the user-visible effect.

## Why

Explain the research, teaching, correctness, or reproducibility reason.

## Validation

List exact commands and results. Distinguish unit simulation, RTL simulation, Vivado timing, and physical-board evidence.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make check` passes.
- [ ] Public interfaces and documentation are updated when needed.
- [ ] No generated build output, private model, dataset, credential, or proprietary log is included.
- [ ] Board-affecting changes include WNS/resource data and `TINYML_NPU_BOARD_PASS` evidence.
- [ ] Performance statements identify their measurement boundary.
